qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SQL injection in JDBC component permits attacker-controlled database operations
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes a deserialization vulnerability in Apache Camel LevelDB component (CWE-502, CVE-2026-25747) involving DefaultLevelDBSerializer using ObjectInputStream without ObjectInputFilter. This finding describes SQL injection in the camel-jdbc component (CWE-89), which is a different vulnerability type in a different component with a different root cause. The vulnerable code, attack vector, and impact mechanism are entirely unrelated.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerability. The advisory (GHSA-429q-mrc4-38fr / CVE-2026-25747) describes deserialization of untrusted data in Apache Camel's LevelDB component, specifically in the DefaultLevelDBSerializer class which uses java.io.ObjectInputStream without ObjectInputFilter or class-loading restrictions. The advisory states that an attacker who can write to LevelDB database files can inject a crafted serialized Java object for arbitrary code execution during aggregation repository operations. The only qualifying finding (camel-jdbc-sql-injection) is a SQL injection vulnerability in the camel-jdbc component, which is a different vulnerability type (CWE-89 vs CWE-502), different component (JDBC vs LevelDB), and different root cause (unvalidated SQL from message body vs unsafe ObjectInputStream deserialization). The finding does not match the vulnerable code, root cause, component, or attack surface described in the advisory.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-429q-mrc4-38fr: Apache Camel LevelDB DefaultLevelDBSerializer deserializes data from LevelDB aggregation repository using java.io.ObjectInputStream without ObjectInputFilter
Advisory vulnerability type: CWE-502 (Deserialization of Untrusted Data)

Finding (camel-jdbc-sql-injection): Different component (camel-jdbc), different vulnerability type (SQL injection, CWE-89), different root cause (unvalidated SQL from message body to Statement.execute)
No finding references DefaultLevelDBSerializer, LevelDB aggregation repository, or ObjectInputStream deserialization in Apache Camel
